name: Afshan Shereef
subtitle: Airbrush Makeup
text: The makeup process was very comfortable for me especially because I did a trial makeup beforehand. The artists were very calm and friendly. They always asked for me opinion and made sure that I liked it through every step. I am very happy with how the makeup turned out, it was definitely worth it!!

name: Sumi Rashik
subtitle: Airbrush Makeup
text: I had a great experience working with the team for my photoshoot. They did both traditional and mordern makeup, and both of them was perfect. They were very proffesional and even helped me be confident and relaxed for the shoot.

name: Shilpa Menon
subtitle: Airbrush and Glass Makeup
text: They did all of my wedding functions including haldi, wedding and reception. I had very different looks and preferences for different days and all of it turned out perfect. I wanted minimal and natural look and they nailed it. They also did my mother's and cousins' makeup very well.

name: Nazmi Saleek
subtitle: Airbrush and Glass Makeup
text: I loved the team of artists that did my makeup. Even when everything else was hectic and when I was tired, they patiently did my makeup. They even let me sleep while the makeup was being done. They were very understanding and friendly. They did both my wedding and reception.

name: Sruthy Sithara
subtitle: Model Shoot
text: The team at Revive understood exactly what I wanted for my nikah. They respected my hijab style and created a stunning look that honored my faith while making me feel absolutely beautiful. The makeup was flawless and lasted throughout the entire ceremony and reception. Highly recommended for Muslim brides!

name: Priya Menon
subtitle: Hindu Wedding
text: My dream bridal look came to life! The artists were so patient during the trial sessions and understood exactly what traditional Kerala Hindu bridal makeup should look like. The final result was beyond perfect - I felt like a queen! The makeup lasted the entire day through all the ceremonies. Thank you Revive!
